en_title: Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution Are 'Not Timed Exclusives,' Xbox Says — So They'll Never Launch on PlayStation
cn_title: Xbox确认《战争机器：事变日》等作永久独占，永不上架PlayStation
subtitle: 永久独占，绝不限时
opus_summary: Xbox确认《战争机器：事变日》和《Clockwork Revolution》为完全独占游戏，不会登陆PlayStation。负责人阿莎·夏尔玛表示此举旨在让玩家因优质游戏选择Xbox。但并非所有游戏都独占，如《腐烂国度3》仍将登陆PS5。

paragraphs.en: Xbox has clarified that Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution are now full console exclusives — and won't arrive on PlayStation, even at a later date.
paragraphs.cn: Xbox已明确，《战争机器：事变日》和《Clockwork Revolution》现为完全主机独占游戏——即便日后也不会登陆PlayStation。

paragraphs.en: Perhaps the biggest surprise during today's Xbox Showcase livestream was confirmation that several upcoming blockbuster games were now being kept back as Xbox console exclusives — so while they will also arrive on PC, they won't appear on PlayStation 5 or Nintendo Switch 2.
paragraphs.cn: 今日Xbox展示会直播中最令人意外的消息，莫过于确认多款即将推出的重磅大作将作为Xbox主机独占游戏保留——也就是说，它们虽会登陆PC，但不会出现在PS5或任天堂Switch 2上。

paragraphs.en: Debate around Xbox exclusivity has been rife over the past few months, as newly-installed Xbox boss Asha Sharma has made other changes to the brand's offering — cutting the price of Game Pass, and making a fresh push for new console features.
paragraphs.cn: 过去几个月里，关于Xbox独占策略的争论不绝于耳，新任Xbox负责人阿莎·夏尔玛还对品牌服务做出了其他调整——降低Game Pass价格，并重新推动新主机功能。

paragraphs.en: When questioned on whether Xbox exclusivity might also return, Sharma has previously been coy — but now, it's clear that the company is reviving the idea, even if its still unclear exactly what the rules will be going forward.
paragraphs.cn: 此前被问及Xbox独占是否会回归时，夏尔玛一直含糊其辞——但现在，很明显公司正在重拾这一理念，尽管未来具体规则仍不明朗。

paragraphs.en: "As part of our focus on the return of Xbox, we also announced that Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution will be Xbox console exclusives," Joe Skrebels, Xbox Wire Editor-in-Chief wrote in a blog post . "These are not timed exclusives. Games already announced for multiplatform releases will stick to that plan – we're committed to investing in and growing Xbox both on console and beyond."
paragraphs.cn: 「作为我们聚焦Xbox回归的一部分，我们还宣布《战争机器：事变日》和《Clockwork Revolution》将成为Xbox主机独占游戏，」Xbox Wire主编Joe Skrebels在博文中写道。「这些并非限时独占。已宣布多平台发行的游戏将维持原计划——我们致力于在主机及其他领域投资并壮大Xbox。」

paragraphs.en: Will every Xbox game be an exclusive going forward? No — as today we saw Hellblade threequel Senua announced with a PS5 version confirmed, and State of Decay 3 given a 2027 launch window plus confirmation of a PS5 version.
paragraphs.cn: 那么未来每款Xbox游戏都会是独占吗？并非如此——今天我们看到《地狱之刃》三部曲续作《Senua》公布时确认了PS5版本，《腐烂国度3》也给出了2027年发售窗口并确认登陆PS5。

paragraphs.en: Could Microsoft make Elder Scrolls 6 a console exclusive? It seems unlikely. What about future entries in the Forza series, that has sold well on Sony's console? And of course, numerous Microsoft-owned franchises will obviously also remain multiplatform, such as new launches in the Minecraft and Call of Duty series.
paragraphs.cn: 微软会让《上古卷轴6》成为主机独占吗？似乎不太可能。那在索尼主机上销量不错的《极限竞速》系列未来作品呢？当然，众多微软旗下IP显然仍将保持多平台发行，例如《我的世界》和《使命召唤》系列的新作。

paragraphs.en: "We want people to choose Xbox because of great games and experiences. That also means giving you something that was made for Xbox," Sharma wrote on X/Twitter, shedding no more light on the situation. "Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution will be Xbox console exclusives!"
paragraphs.cn: 「我们希望人们因为出色的游戏和体验而选择Xbox。这也意味着为你提供专为Xbox打造的内容，」夏尔玛在X上写道，并未透露更多细节。「《战争机器：事变日》和《Clockwork Revolution》将是Xbox主机独占游戏！」

paragraphs.en: For more, be sure to check out IGN's roundup of everything announced at Xbox Showcase 2026 .
paragraphs.cn: 欲了解更多信息，请务必查看IGN对Xbox 2026展示会所有公告的汇总。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN新闻编辑。可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
